classifications.reason: Explicit parser-local bridge for TypeSpec record probes that still receive rendered tag maps; direct record_def and structured record metadata are preferred.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when parser callers carry record_def or structured record keys for all record TypeSpec probes.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent comment documents the compatibility entry point and states direct record_def/structured metadata are preferred.

classifications.reason: Rendered named constant lookup is an opt-in bridge for legacy/HIR template paths; parser-owned callers use TextId authority.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when legacy/HIR template paths pass TextId or structured constant metadata.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent comment says new parser-owned callers should use the TextId surface and ordinary overload resolution should not select this path.

classifications.reason: Parser state tracks rendered struct tags during local parsing before sema assigns structured record authority.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove or reclassify when parser state no longer carries rendered record tag mirrors.
classifications.evidence: Step 1 selected parser rendered record maps as known compatibility surfaces.

classifications.reason: Rendered tag to AST-node map is parser-local compatibility state; sema record identity is structured by record kind and key.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when parser record references always carry direct record_def or structured record metadata.
classifications.evidence: Parser support comments identify rendered parser tag maps as compatibility bridges.

classifications.reason: Rendered enum constants are consulted only after structured key and TextId lookup paths; metadata-rich misses fail closed first.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when all enum constant evaluation callers provide TextId or structured enum maps.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent comment says the rendered spelling map is a retained no-metadata compatibility mirror.

classifications.reason: Rendered-name value maps support legacy HIR/sema handoffs and interpreter paths that lack TextId or structured name metadata.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when all consteval producers provide TextId or structured maps.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent alias comment names owner, limitation, and removal condition.

classifications.reason: Rendered template type bindings are a compatibility mirror; text/key maps are authoritative when metadata exists.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when all template binding lookups carry metadata.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent alias comment says rendered bindings are not authoritative when text/key metadata is present.

classifications.reason: Rendered parameter spelling selects TextId authority for legacy TypeSpecs; it is not binding authority itself.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when all TypeSpecs carry parameter TextId or structured owner metadata directly.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent comment states the map selects TextId authority and is not binding authority.

classifications.reason: Rendered parameter spelling selects structured binding-key authority for legacy TypeSpecs; complete key lookup remains authoritative.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when all TypeSpecs carry structured binding owner metadata directly.
classifications.evidence: lookup_type_binding_by_legacy_rendered_key_bridge comments require complete structured misses to stay closed.

classifications.reason: Helper enters TextId binding authority from legacy rendered TypeSpec tags and must not reopen rendered bindings after a metadata miss.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when typedef TypeSpecs carry binding TextIds directly and no legacy display-tag build remains.
classifications.evidence: Function comment explicitly describes owner, limitation, and removal condition.

classifications.reason: Helper uses rendered spelling only to select the structured key mirror; the key map remains authority.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when typedef TypeSpecs carry structured binding owner metadata directly and no legacy display-tag build remains.
classifications.evidence: Function comment says key-mirror misses must not reopen type_bindings.

classifications.reason: Rendered-string mirror for legacy parser carriers and diagnostics/tests; SemaStructuredNameKey tables are record identity authority.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when parser carriers and diagnostics/tests no longer need rendered record-tag lookup.
classifications.evidence: Adjacent comment says this is ambiguous-safe compatibility glue, not semantic authority.

classifications.reason: Unqualified rendered-name grouping is retained beside struct_defs_by_key_ for legacy lookup/reporting paths.
classifications.removal_condition: Remove when all record references and reports use SemaStructuredNameKey ownership.

classifications.reason: Outer key is SemaStructuredNameKey record authority; inner rendered field names map to TextIds within that already-structured owner domain.

classifications.reason: Rendered template parameter spelling is a migration mirror; owner-aware HirTemplateParameterBindingKey metadata is the intended authority.
